title: MCLN EX61 Cycle Count Recount Acceptance Enhancement Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 right 309880 EX 61 – Cycle Count Recount Acceptance Enablement 0 0 EX 61 – Cycle Count Recount Acceptance Enablement Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. ex61 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup PAGEREF _Toc793310607 \h 2 1.1 Enablement C-000 System Code PAGEREF _Toc1765891536 \h 3 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES PAGEREF _Toc710621615 \h 5 2.1 C-000-EX61 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc2075808740 \h 6 2.2 C-000-EX61 Parameter Enablement PAGEREF _Toc1129407084 \h 6 3.1 C-E61 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc1611009547 \h 7 3.2 Facilities Cycle Count Unit Tolerance Percentage Set-up PAGEREF _Toc1078240950 \h 9 4. Add Cycle Count Transaction Parameter 502-502 PAGEREF _Toc1297873801 \h 10 1. ex61 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL Code Setup Enablement C-000 System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. 2. ADD ADDITIONAL CUSTOM CODES C-000-EX61 Enablement 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX 61 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under the Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX 6 1 Parameter Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. C-E61 Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C- E61 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the followin g information: Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code Parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Facilities Cycle Count Unit Tolerance Percentage Set-up Open up Facilities UI and filter by Facility ID = ‘360’ Highlight facility ID 360 and view into it. Click on Warehouse Details Click on inventory Tab and scroll down to “Cycle Count Unit Tolerance Percentage” and set to expected tolerance % for location count. 4 . Add Cycle Count Transaction Parameter 50 2 -50 2 Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for “ CYC* ” under transaction name. Click on “ Cyc Cnt Active – Sys Dir ” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right Click “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below Hit “Save” Click on “Transaction Parameters” Click on “ CYC* ” transaction Select “Parameters” tab and click “Edit” Go to Byte 50 2 -50 2 Recount Enablement Check the Y/N flag and “save” 11. Repeat above steps to add Additional Cycle Count Transaction Parameter 502-502 for each necessary Transaction Name .
